title: The Gay Cavalier
writer: O. Henry, Charles Belden, Sidney Sutherland
actors: Gilbert Roland, Martin Garralaga, Nacho Galindo
plot: The Cisco Kid (Gilbert Roland) sets out on a double mission of rescuing a girl from forsaking her true love by marrying a supposedly wealthy suitor to save the old family hacienda, and he is also after the outlaws that robbed a st...
